issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error scenarios or edge cases, focusing only on happy path examples.

scenarios.name: Simple platformer with coin pickup
scenarios.rationale: Baseline used a generic canvas/Phaser-style loop without the kaplay component array, body(), area(), onCollide, or isGrounded() patterns the rubric requires; treatment composed the entity from component array, used onCollide for coins, and gated jump on isGrounded().

scenarios.name: Patrolling enemy as a reusable component
scenarios.rationale: Baseline wrote a class with setInterval-style movement and no plug-in component shape; treatment defined a function returning {id, add, update} and mounted it inside the component array next to body()/area() with a tag, matching the documented custom-component pattern.
